radius.$description: Corner radius system per warmth-layer-locked spec. Three discrete steps, no in-between values.

none.$description: No radius — sharp edges, for production-register tables and grids

sharp.$description: Sharp — Production Register (cue sheets, schedules, SOWs, contracts). The precision IS the design.

default.$description: Default — most card and button radii. Neutral register.

soft.$description: Soft — Cinematic Register (marketing, social, BTS, proposal covers).

pill.$description: Pill — fully rounded badges, status indicators
